source_jobs.title: Intermediate QA Test Developer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

At ZayZoon, we are on a mission to save 10 million hardworking employees 10 billion dollars. We’ve created a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a big impact on employee financial wellness. 



We offer a variety of financial wellness services, like earned wage access, that allows employees to access their earned wages ahead of payday. With 74% https://www.zayzoon.com/the-state-of-employee-financial-wellnessof ZayZoon customers reporting reduced financial stress, we know our solutions help lead to happier and more productive employees. ZayZoon was also recognized for its growth in the 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 50 https://www.newswire.ca/news-releases/deloitte-canada-unveils-2025-technology-fast-50-tm-program-winners-as-tech-resilience-powers-cross-country-innovation-886643713.html, 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 500 https://www.deloitte.com/content/dam/assets-zone3/us/en/docs/services/deloitte-private/2025/us-2025-technology-fast-500-rankings.pdf, and top-10 growth companies in Canada by CIX awards https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access. Our recent funding extension has raised our Series B funding round to nearly $50 million USD https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access 🎉  Join us in shaping the future of employee financial wellness and building services that address the immediate needs of today's employees.



You might see a few cities listed, but no need to be in any of them! We’re fully remote and hire across Canada and the U.S.



At ZayZoon, we’re on a mission to empower employees with financial wellness tools that actually make a difference. We’re looking for a QA Test Developer who’s passionate about quality and excited to help us build reliable, high-performing products that impact real lives.

In this role, you'll play a key part in maintaining and growing our mature automation framework while embedding quality into every stage of development across multiple development pods. You’ll collaborate closely with developers, product managers, and the broader engineering team to ensure we deliver seamless experiences across web and mobile.

Your impact:

 - Write and maintain automated tests across web and React Native mobile applications (iOS and Android) within our existing WebdriverIO framework

 - Perform functional, regression, integration, and end-to-end testing

 - Run and monitor automated tests within CI/CD pipelines and flag issues proactively

 - Debug test failures, analyze results, and communicate findings clearly to developers and stakeholders

 - Collaborate with developers and senior QA to define test strategies for new and existing features

 - Contribute to sprint planning, stand-ups, and grooming sessions to ensure adequate test coverage

 - Create and maintain test plans, test cases, and reporting documentation

 - Support shift-left testing practices to catch issues earlier in the development cycle

 - Grow your ownership of the automation framework over time with guidance from the team

You bring:

 - 3+ years of experience in QA automation or software development

 - Hands-on experience with WebdriverIO, Playwright, or a comparable modern test automation framework

 - Familiarity with TypeScript or JavaScript in a testing context

 - Exposure to React Native or mobile application testing is a plus

 - Experience running automated tests within CI/CD pipelines

 - Solid debugging and troubleshooting skills with a proactive approach to problem-solving

 - Familiarity with API testing tools such as Mocha, Supertest, Postman, or similar

 - Working knowledge of Git, GitHub, Jira, and Agile development practices

Research shows that while men apply to jobs when they meet an average of 60% of listed criteria, women and other marginalized folks tend to only apply when they check every box. Think you have what it takes, but not sure you chec

source_jobs.title: Senior Controller
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

At ZayZoon, we are on a mission to save 10 million hardworking employees 10 billion dollars. We’ve created a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a big impact on employee financial wellness. 



We offer a variety of financial wellness services, like earned wage access, that allows employees to access their earned wages ahead of payday. With 74% https://www.zayzoon.com/the-state-of-employee-financial-wellnessof ZayZoon customers reporting reduced financial stress, we know our solutions help lead to happier and more productive employees. ZayZoon was also recognized for its growth in the 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 50 https://www.newswire.ca/news-releases/deloitte-canada-unveils-2025-technology-fast-50-tm-program-winners-as-tech-resilience-powers-cross-country-innovation-886643713.html, 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 500 https://www.deloitte.com/content/dam/assets-zone3/us/en/docs/services/deloitte-private/2025/us-2025-technology-fast-500-rankings.pdf, and top-10 growth companies in Canada by CIX awards https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access. Our recent funding extension has raised our Series B funding round to nearly $50 million USD https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access 🎉  Join us in shaping the future of employee financial wellness and building services that address the immediate needs of today's employees.



You might see a few cities listed, but no need to be in any of them! We’re fully remote and hire across Canada and the U.S.



About the role:

Numbers tell a story, and as ZayZoon's Senior Controller, you'll be the one making sure that story is clear, accurate, and trusted across the business. This is a hands-on leadership role where you'll own the financial reporting function end-to-end, from the monthly close cycle to audit delivery and everything in between. You'll lead our accounting team, build out the processes and controls that keep us on solid footing, and be a real partner to the business, not just the person who signs off on the numbers. If you love bringing structure to complex environments and take genuine pride in the integrity of your work, this one's for you.

Your impact:

 - Lead all core accounting operations, including the general ledger, month-end close, and IFRS/GAAP-compliant financial reporting

 - Prepare and review quarterly and annual financial statements, MD&A, and continuous disclosure filings, and present findings and recommendations to senior leadership

 - Own the external audit process from start to finish, managing auditor relationships and keeping deliverables on track

 - Build and maintain strong internal controls, including segregation of duties and approval frameworks, that scale with the business

 - Manage multi-entity accounting, intracompany eliminations, and SPV structures to support reliable consolidated reporting

 - Lead, coach, and grow the accounting team, creating an environment where people feel supported and do their best work

 - Use data analytics and financial modelling to surface insights and support smarter decision-making across the business

 - Identify opportunities to improve and scale financial processes as ZayZoon grows, and bring forward practical solutions

You bring:

 - CPA designation

 - 10+ years of progressive accounting experience, including 3+ years in a supervisory or management role

 - Deep knowledge of IFRS or US GAAP

 - A track record of managing month-end close, audits, financial reporting, and internal controls in a fast-moving environment

 - Comfort with multi-entity structures and intracompany accounting

 - Strong attention to detail and a controls-oriented mindset, without losing sight of the bigger picture

 - Excellent analytical, communication, and presentation skills with the ability to translate financial data into actionable insights

 - Curiosity around AI and

source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

At ZayZoon, we are on a mission to save 10 million hardworking employees 10 billion dollars. We’ve created a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a big impact on employee financial wellness. 



We offer a variety of financial wellness services, like earned wage access, that allows employees to access their earned wages ahead of payday. With 74% https://www.zayzoon.com/the-state-of-employee-financial-wellnessof ZayZoon customers reporting reduced financial stress, we know our solutions help lead to happier and more productive employees. ZayZoon was also recognized for its growth in the 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 50 https://www.newswire.ca/news-releases/deloitte-canada-unveils-2025-technology-fast-50-tm-program-winners-as-tech-resilience-powers-cross-country-innovation-886643713.html, 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 500 https://www.deloitte.com/content/dam/assets-zone3/us/en/docs/services/deloitte-private/2025/us-2025-technology-fast-500-rankings.pdf, and top-10 growth companies in Canada by CIX awards https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access. Our recent funding extension has raised our Series B funding round to nearly $50 million USD https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access 🎉  Join us in shaping the future of employee financial wellness and building services that address the immediate needs of today's employees.



You might see a few cities listed, but no need to be in any of them! We’re fully remote and hire across Canada and the U.S.



About the role:

At ZayZoon, we've built a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a real impact on employee financial wellness, and the infrastructure you build here directly powers that mission.

We're looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer who sits at the intersection of engineering, data, testing, and security. You'll embed closely with app and infrastructure engineers, keeping a sharp eye on how our systems perform and making sure they're built to scale. If you love ownership, automation, making environments a platform and also get excited about deep-diving into observability, data performance, and leaving systems better than you found them, this is the hybrid challenge you've been looking for.



Your impact:

 - Own and develop ZayZoon's infrastructure-as-code using CloudFormation, with an emphasis on serverless resources (ECS, Fargate, Lambda)

 - Instrument and analyze daily metrics across both infrastructure performance and our Ruby on Rails applications, using AWS tooling (Athena, CloudTrail) and third-party observability platforms (Grafana, OTel, CloudWatch)

 - Build, optimize, and maintain efficient pipelines (GitHub Actions, CodeDeploy, CodePipeline) to accelerate developer velocity, including modern deployment strategies like blue/green deployments and intelligent auto-scaling

 - Stay ahead of resource dependencies, particularly databases (RDS, Redshift), including upgrades, playbooks, and downtime planning

 - Work closely with application developers to serve all of their infrastructure needs. Turning repeatable needs like spinning up environments, running jobs etc. into platform services that can be used by devs whenever they need them.

 - Project costs and implement AWS cost savings programs and reserved instances

 - Partner with our risk and security teams to maintain SOC-2 and cybersecurity compliance, and actively evaluate and remediate Critical and High CVEs across all services

 - Collaborate extensively with app developers on shared metrics, database performance, and load testing

 - Collaborate extensively with data engineers to facilitate data warehouse development, ELT, and ETL

 - Participate in our agile process: sprint planning, story grooming, and standup

 - Champion our SDLC and secure coding practices across everything you ship

You bring:

 - 5+ years of cloud

source_jobs.title: Go to Market (GTM) Automation Specialist
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

At ZayZoon, we are on a mission to save 10 million hardworking employees 10 billion dollars. We’ve created a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a big impact on employee financial wellness. 



We offer a variety of financial wellness services, like earned wage access, that allows employees to access their earned wages ahead of payday. With 74% https://www.zayzoon.com/the-state-of-employee-financial-wellnessof ZayZoon customers reporting reduced financial stress, we know our solutions help lead to happier and more productive employees. ZayZoon was also recognized for its growth in the 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 50 https://www.newswire.ca/news-releases/deloitte-canada-unveils-2025-technology-fast-50-tm-program-winners-as-tech-resilience-powers-cross-country-innovation-886643713.html, 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 500 https://www.deloitte.com/content/dam/assets-zone3/us/en/docs/services/deloitte-private/2025/us-2025-technology-fast-500-rankings.pdf, and top-10 growth companies in Canada by CIX awards https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access. Our recent funding extension has raised our Series B funding round to nearly $50 million USD https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access 🎉  Join us in shaping the future of employee financial wellness and building services that address the immediate needs of today's employees.



You might see a few cities listed, but no need to be in any of them! We’re fully remote and hire across Canada and the U.S.



About the role:

As our GTM Automation Specialist, you’ll help us get more out of our systems and find smarter ways to automate, connect, and scale. You’ll focus on improving how we prospect, enrich data, personalize outreach, and measure what’s working using both our existing tools and new AI capabilities.



You’ll work closely with Sales, Marketing, and RevOps to spot what’s clunky or manual today and turn it into something more streamlined and reliable - you’ll be raising the bar on how our systems work and how our teams use them. This role is for the builder who loves connecting complex GTM systems, constantly experiments with the latest automation and AI technologies, and is focused on driving measurable impact for our teams.



Your impact:

 - Evaluate and evolve our existing GTM tech stack by identifying opportunities to better leverage automation and AI across prospecting, enrichment, sequencing, personalization, and reporting

 - Design and orchestrate workflows across our GTM tools (e.g., enrichment platforms, sequencing tools, AI tools) to automate and simplify outbound execution

 - Integrate AI-enabled tooling with our CRM, first-party data, and third-party vendors to ensure clean, enriched, and actionable data flows

 - Build and optimize automated prospecting and enrichment pipelines to improve targeting accuracy, segmentation, and message relevance

 - Enable AI-assisted, multi-channel outbound programs (email, LinkedIn, etc.) that increase personalization while maintaining scale and consistency

 - Partner closely with Sales, RevOps, and Marketing to operationalize outbound strategies and reduce day-to-day execution friction for reps

 - Establish and support a GTM experimentation framework, incorporating AI-driven testing across messaging, targeting, sequencing, and channels

 - Build and refine dashboards and reporting that measure performance, adoption, and ROI of automation and AI-driven GTM initiatives

 - Document workflows, tooling, and AI best practices to drive adoption and long-term scalability across the team

You bring:

 - 4+ years of experience in Go-to-Market Automation, Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or Growth Operations within a SaaS environment

 - Strong experience working with HubSpot, including automation, workflows, data models, and reporting that support scalable GTM operations

source_jobs.title: Staff Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

At ZayZoon, we are on a mission to save 10 million hardworking employees 10 billion dollars. We’ve created a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a big impact on employee financial wellness. 



We offer a variety of financial wellness services, like earned wage access, that allows employees to access their earned wages ahead of payday. With 74% https://www.zayzoon.com/the-state-of-employee-financial-wellnessof ZayZoon customers reporting reduced financial stress, we know our solutions help lead to happier and more productive employees. ZayZoon was also recognized for its growth in the 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 50 https://www.newswire.ca/news-releases/deloitte-canada-unveils-2025-technology-fast-50-tm-program-winners-as-tech-resilience-powers-cross-country-innovation-886643713.html, 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 500 https://www.deloitte.com/content/dam/assets-zone3/us/en/docs/services/deloitte-private/2025/us-2025-technology-fast-500-rankings.pdf, and top-10 growth companies in Canada by CIX awards https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access. Our recent funding extension has raised our Series B funding round to nearly $50 million USD https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access 🎉  Join us in shaping the future of employee financial wellness and building services that address the immediate needs of today's employees.



You might see a few cities listed, but no need to be in any of them! We’re fully remote and hire across Canada and the U.S.



About the role:

We've built a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a real impact on employee financial wellness, and the systems you architect here directly power that mission.

We're looking for a Staff Developer who genuinely cares about building things well. You'll take on the hardest technical problems, champion best practices, and bridge the gap between where our systems are today and where they need to be as we scale. If you're the kind of person who gets pulled toward hard architectural questions, enjoys mentoring, and reaches for data when something needs solving, this is a role where that curiosity gets put to good use every day.



Your impact:

 - Design and maintain scalable, secure software architectures aligned with business goals, resulting in robust and reliable systems

 - Introduce and implement best practices around OO, DDD, and microservices where appropriate

 - Use AI to streamline processes, reduce friction, and give time back to developers for the work that matters

 - Implement and enforce coding standards and best practices, driving measurable improvements in code quality and maintainability

 - Conduct regular code reviews with feedback that meaningfully reduces bug counts and improves software performance

 - Facilitate clear communication between development teams, product managers, and other stakeholders to keep projects aligned

 - Use data as your north star - leverage application data, third-party data, and our data warehouse to analyze and solve problems around both product impact and performance

 - Participate in our agile development process: sprint planning, story grooming, and standups

 - Champion our SDLC and secure coding practices across everything you ship



You bring:

 - 6+ years of experience with Ruby on Rails

 - A mastery of fundamentals: solid coding principles, domain-driven design, performant code and queries, unit and integration testing

 - Experience leading projects involving scale, concurrency, queuing, background processing, and efficient ingestion of third-party data

 - A security mindset: OWASP, secure development, and SOC-2 processes

 - Experience deploying resources outside of app dev (AWS, RDS, queues, serverless)

 - Track record of using AI to simplify workflows, eliminate bottlenecks, and shift focus toward meaningful work

source_jobs.title: QA Test Developer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

At ZayZoon, we are on a mission to save 10 million hardworking employees 10 billion dollars. We’ve created a financial empowerment platform that helps businesses of all sizes make a big impact on employee financial wellness. 



We offer a variety of financial wellness services, like earned wage access, that allows employees to access their earned wages ahead of payday. With 74% https://www.zayzoon.com/the-state-of-employee-financial-wellnessof ZayZoon customers reporting reduced financial stress, we know our solutions help lead to happier and more productive employees. ZayZoon was also recognized for its growth in the 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 50 https://www.newswire.ca/news-releases/deloitte-canada-unveils-2025-technology-fast-50-tm-program-winners-as-tech-resilience-powers-cross-country-innovation-886643713.html, 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 500 https://www.deloitte.com/content/dam/assets-zone3/us/en/docs/services/deloitte-private/2025/us-2025-technology-fast-500-rankings.pdf, and top-10 growth companies in Canada by CIX awards https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access. Our recent funding extension has raised our Series B funding round to nearly $50 million USD https://calgaryherald.com/business/local-business/parker-zayzoon-partners-provide-earned-wage-access 🎉  Join us in shaping the future of employee financial wellness and building services that address the immediate needs of today's employees.



You might see a few cities listed, but no need to be in any of them! We’re fully remote and hire across Canada and the U.S.



About the role:

At ZayZoon, we’re on a mission to empower employees with financial wellness tools that actually make a difference. We’re looking for a QA Test Developer who’s passionate about quality and excited to help us build reliable, high-performing products that impact real lives.

In this role, you'll play a key part in maintaining and growing our mature automation framework while embedding quality into every stage of development across multiple development pods. You’ll collaborate closely with developers, product managers, and the broader engineering team to ensure we deliver seamless experiences across web and mobile.

Your impact:

 - Extend and maintain our mature WebdriverIO automation framework using a component-based Page Object pattern

 - Write and execute automated tests across web and React Native mobile applications (iOS and Android) using WebdriverIO and cloud-based device testing platforms

 - Perform functional, regression, integration, and end-to-end testing

 - Integrate automated testing into our CI/CD pipelines to support fast, reliable releases

 - Debug issues, analyze results, and provide actionable insights to improve product quality

 - Partner with developers to define effective test strategies for new and existing features

 - Champion best practices in test automation, including scalability, reliability, and maintainability

 - Contribute to sprint planning, stand-ups, and grooming sessions to ensure strong test coverage

 - Create and maintain clear test plans, test cases, and reporting documentation

 - Promote quality, automation, and testability throughout the software development lifecycle

 - Collaborate across multiple development pods, balancing priorities and maintaining quality standards simultaneously

 - Support shift-left testing practices to catch issues earlier and reduce downstream risk

You bring:

 - 5+ years of experience in QA automation or software development

 - Strong hands-on experience with WebdriverIO (component-based architecture or Page Object patterns) or equivalent depth in Playwright with demonstrated ability to ramp up on WDIO quickly

 - Experience with integration testing and Node.js-based test frameworks

 - Strong proficiency in TypeScript and Node.js, with practical experience working within Node.js-based frameworks

 - Experience testing React Native app

notes: Financial wellness platform with a mix of tech and non-tech roles
